items.title: Enhance hcaptcha CLI with Proxy Support in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces support for a proxy option in the hcaptcha token command, aligning the CLI with the latest OpenAPI contract. Users can now specify a proxy URL when requesting tokens, with the existing behavior preserved when the proxy option is omitted. Documentation has been updated to include usage examples and command help for the new feature.

items.title: Enhance Documentation Standards in Index 📚
items.summary: This update introduces two critical reminders to the AGENTS.md file to improve documentation practices. It emphasizes the importance of not leaking upstream supplier information in customer-facing texts and mandates that any service changes must be accompanied by corresponding documentation updates in the same PR. These changes aim to prevent stale documentation and ensure clarity for users.

items.title: Revamp API Docs and Scrub Upstream Leaks in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the documentation for the gpt-image-2 API, correcting the `n` parameter functionality and improving clarity on variant options. Critical upstream information leaks have been removed from customer-facing texts, ensuring compliance and security. These changes aim to provide a more accurate and user-friendly experience for developers.

items.title: Enhance Browser Provider Readiness in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves browser provider readiness by integrating online-compatible providers through the Auth dispatch-context before rendering connector status. It also implements a fail-closed mechanism for offline or incompatible browser bindings, ensuring sanitized logs and bounded concurrent probes. Extensive testing has been conducted to validate the changes, enhancing overall system reliability.

items.title: Enhance Captcha Documentation with BYOP Proxy Support in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the documentation for the captcha endpoints by adding support for the BYOP proxy parameter and timing fields. Key changes include updates to OpenAPI specs and development documentation for various captcha types, ensuring consistency across all endpoints. The enhancements will help developers better understand and implement the new features effectively.

items.title: Align Grok Video Model with Latest API in Clis 🎥
items.summary: This update synchronizes the Grok CLI with the latest OpenAPI contract for video models. Key changes include updated allowed model values and a new default model. Additionally, the CLI output and documentation have been revised to reflect these updates, ensuring consistency across the platform.

items.title: Enhance Browser Contract with Locator Plan in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a signed `locator_plan` definition to the browser contract, ensuring a fixed `max_resolution_attempts` of 2 while bounding role, name, text, and label selectors. Additionally, the wire digest golden vector has been updated, and all related tests have passed successfully. This change is crucial for maintaining contract integrity and improving browser functionality.

items.title: Enhance Grok Video Stability and Official Endpoint Design in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive design for improving Grok video stabilization and onboarding the official ttapi endpoint. Key changes include addressing critical failures related to token availability and duration validation, alongside a dual-channel strategy for endpoint management. The rollout plan encompasses necessary adjustments across multiple components, ensuring a smoother user experience.

items.title: Enhance Grok Video Models for Better Performance in M C Ps 🎥
items.summary: This update introduces four new video models to the GrokMCP video tools, enhancing the capabilities of the ttapi worker. Key changes include updates to the core configuration and types, as well as improvements to the video tools and documentation. The modifications ensure cleaner code and improved functionality, with all tests passing successfully.

items.title: Enhance Grok Video Models with New Endpoints in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces four new Grok video models, replacing the previous picker with options for fast and official endpoints. Key changes include updated model IDs, duration helpers, and improved internationalization support across 17 locales. The ModelSelector and DurationSelector components have been modified to accommodate these new features, ensuring a smoother user experience.

items.title: Enhance Billing for Grok Video Models in Backend 🎥
items.summary: This update introduces new billing models for the Grok video API, including reverse and official pricing variants. Key changes include the addition of four new suffixed models, updated API specifications, and refreshed documentation. The modifications ensure accurate billing and improved cost management for users, with all tests passing successfully.

items.title: Enhance Video Endpoint with Official Support in Platform Service 🎥
items.summary: This update introduces the Official grok-video endpoint alongside the existing UnOfficial one, utilizing a new model-naming scheme. Key changes include modifications to settings, core functionality, and handler validations to support the new endpoint structure and ensure compatibility with billing rules. Legacy model names are no longer accepted, streamlining the video generation process.

items.title: Clean Up Footer Links and Rename UI Platform to Studio in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the broken Profile link from the footer and renames the UI Platform link to Studio. The changes were applied across all 12 locales, ensuring consistency in branding. All related i18n keys have been updated or removed accordingly, enhancing the user experience on the platform.

items.title: Enhance Resource Stream Verification in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update implements end-to-end verification for resource streams, ensuring that BrowserResource COS metadata is validated against signed receipts before delivery. Key improvements include atomic reservation of receipts, incremental enforcement of byte types and sizes, and robust handling of stream closures on various failure conditions. This completes the server-side streaming lifecycle for BrowserResource, enhancing reliability and security.

items.title: Sync Locator Contract Digest in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update synchronizes the browser locator contract digest with the latest changes from the PlatformService. Key modifications include updating the wire digest and preserving the existing generated-file style. All browser execution operator tests have passed, ensuring stability during this rollout.

items.title: Sync Extension Contract for Improved Stability in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update regenerates the Extension contract from the PlatformService source, ensuring a consistent wire digest and removing outdated JSON contracts. The package version has been bumped to 0.7.7, and extensive validation has confirmed the stability of the changes with all tests passing. This prepares the extension for internal execution and aligns it with the latest standards.

items.title: Sync browser contract and update settings in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update regenerates the Auth browser contract based on the latest changes from PlatformService. Key modifications include pinning the wire digest and updating the minimum extension version to 0.7.7. Validation tests for browser capability and pairing have successfully passed, ensuring stability and reliability.

items.title: Enhance X402 Catalog Allowlist Loading in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update loads the `X402_CATALOG_ALLOWLIST` from the existing `x402` Kubernetes Secret, ensuring production remains closed by default with an empty Secret value. A deployment contract test has been added to prevent hardcoded API routes, enhancing security and maintainability. All relevant tests have passed, confirming the stability of the changes.

items.title: Enhance Fidelity Checks for Story Quality in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an independent fidelity judge to ensure explicit brief fidelity against canonical plans. Key changes include hard-blocking drift in character identities, relationships, and specified meanings, alongside a final mutating gate for fidelity checks. The implementation aims to enhance internal coherence and prevent mismatches in story elements, significantly improving the validation process.

items.title: Enhance Browser Connection Handling in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update exposes active browser device connections to the interactive aichat2 connector while ensuring they remain excluded from provider access-token and scheduled unattended policies. Key changes include the introduction of the `isCredentialBackedConnection` function to enhance security and prevent unauthorized access. Comprehensive testing has validated the functionality and stability of these modifications.

items.title: Hide Crypto Token Address for Mainland China Visitors in Frontend Web 🚫
items.summary: This update modifies the footer component to hide the $ACE token contract address for visitors from mainland China, ensuring compliance with regulations. The change utilizes an existing computed property to conditionally render the address, maintaining consistency with other elements in the footer. This adjustment enhances user experience while adhering to necessary guidelines.

items.title: Hide Roadmap Link for China Visitors in Frontend Web 🚫
items.summary: This update modifies the footer to hide the Roadmap link for visitors from mainland China, ensuring it is only visible to non-China users. The change uses a conditional rendering approach that aligns with existing geo-gated links, maintaining SSR/SSG safety. This enhancement improves the user experience by preventing access to overseas resources for users in the China region.

items.title: Show China ICP Filing Only to Mainland Visitors in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the footer component to display the China ICP filing only for visitors from mainland China. The change utilizes the existing `isChina` computed property to ensure compliance with local regulations, preventing non-China visitors from seeing the filing. This enhances user experience while maintaining necessary legal requirements.

items.title: Enhance WeChat Promotion Article for Studio in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive promotional article for Studio, tailored for WeChat. It covers key features such as the integration of various AI capabilities and detailed insights into branding, pricing, and distribution mechanisms. The article has undergone thorough reviews and optimizations to ensure clarity and effectiveness in conveying the product's value.

items.title: Align Browser Authority Descriptors for Xiaohongshu in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update aligns the Xiaohongshu Browser operation descriptors with the production authority schema from AuthBackend. Key changes include deriving exact wire command allowlists and implementing dynamic validation for declared operations to prevent future sync regressions. The update resolves a production failure that left the Skill hidden due to descriptor issues.

items.title: Sync Locator Contract Digest in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies Xiaohongshu's generated compact browser manifest to align with the latest changes from the PlatformService. Key updates include pinning the wire digest and ensuring the facade catalog remains unchanged. Validation tests have confirmed that the contract and cross-site boundary suites have passed successfully.

items.title: Lock Kickart Decisions for E-commerce APIs in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update finalizes key decisions regarding the Kickart e-commerce video integration, including the launch of all three APIs and official-parity pricing. The documentation now includes a comprehensive per-tier credits table, ensuring clarity for billing. Additionally, compliance measures have been integrated into the OpenAPI and user terms, paving the way for a smoother launch.

items.title: Enhance Story Plan Normalization in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the normalization of adjacent bridge references in story plans, ensuring they align with existing causal facts. Key changes include adjustments to setup and payoff references, allowing for passive characters without commitments, and implementing a retry mechanism for the planner on validation failures. These enhancements aim to streamline the story planning process and maintain production integrity.

items.title: Enhanced Key Management with Secret-Backed Artifacts in X402 Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the mandatory Tencent KMS with a versioned Secret-backed AES-256-GCM key encryption key (KEK). Key changes include the addition of compatibility checks, two-phase rotation, and validation for secrets, while removing the Tencent KMS SDK dependency. The deployment process has been streamlined, ensuring a clean production ledger and robust artifact management.

items.title: Enhance Story Quality Gate with Maestro CLI in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a structured story quality gate for the short-drama skill within Maestro. Key features include a mandatory agent-run CLI for validation and rewriting, alongside the enforcement of narrative continuity through the new NarrativeBridge. The changes ensure that all story artifacts are locked and verified, enhancing the reliability of the storytelling process.

items.title: Integrate Kickart E-commerce Video API in Index 🎥
items.summary: This update introduces a new design document for integrating the Volcengine Kickart e-commerce video API into AceDataCloud. Key features include three asynchronous video APIs, a new worker for handling requests, and a structured billing approach. The integration aims to enhance video marketing capabilities for e-commerce, with a phased rollout planned for implementation.

items.title: Enhance Card Payment Icon for Consistency in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update replaces the plain line-drawing credit card icon with a VISA/Mastercard image for the Card payment method on order pages. The change ensures a consistent look across all payment icons, including WeChat Pay and Alipay. Additionally, the unused CreditCardIcon component has been removed, streamlining the codebase.

items.title: Introducing Cloudflare Turnstile CLI for Easy Captcha Management in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a new Cloudflare Turnstile CLI, enabling users to retrieve bypass tokens and manage configurations seamlessly. Key commands include `turnstile token` for token retrieval and `turnstile config` for displaying current settings. The implementation follows the structure of the existing hcaptcha CLI, ensuring consistency and ease of use.

items.title: Decouple Artifact Purge from Usage Projection in X402 Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update successfully decouples the artifact TTL cleanup from the retired usage projection, enhancing the system's reliability. Key improvements include making concurrent artifact purges idempotent and aligning production gates with a direct atomic USDC catalog. The changes also address several risks associated with concurrent purging and ensure robust testing coverage.

items.title: Enhance Midjourney Error Handling in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update generalizes the error classification for Midjourney upstream errors, addressing issues where user input errors resulted in misleading HTTP 500 responses instead of the appropriate 400. Key changes include the introduction of a new utility function for matching error messages and the consolidation of error handling logic across multiple handlers, reducing code complexity significantly. The improvements ensure more accurate error reporting and reduce false alarms in monitoring systems.

items.title: Streamlined API Documentation for Clarity in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update consolidates API documentation by removing duplicated OpenAPI specs and service docs from the PlatformService repository, ensuring a single source of truth in PlatformBackend. A total of 111 files were changed, resulting in approximately 27.8k deletions, while essential service README files were updated to link directly to the authoritative documentation. This change enhances maintainability and reduces the risk of inconsistencies across documentation.

items.title: Fix seed script for Discord bot service in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses a critical issue in the seed script for the Discord bot service, where a non-existent 'name' field caused a TypeError during execution. The fix involves removing the 'name' keyword argument and using 'title' instead, ensuring the script runs smoothly. The corrected script has been verified against production, successfully creating the live service and seeding the necessary translations.

items.title: Revamp Discord Deploy Wizard with Styled Components in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update fixes the Discord deploy wizard, which previously rendered as unstyled text due to missing Element Plus component registrations. Key changes include the registration of necessary components and a complete redesign featuring a new layout, improved visuals, and additional internationalization keys for better user experience. The wizard now displays correctly with all elements styled and functional.

items.title: Onboard Cloudflare Turnstile Captcha Service in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the Cloudflare Turnstile captcha service to the platform, enabling users to utilize the new endpoint for captcha verification. Key changes include the addition of billing details, OpenAPI specifications, and comprehensive documentation for integration. The service mirrors existing captcha services, ensuring a seamless experience for users.

items.title: Enhance yescaptcha with Cloudflare Turnstile Support in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new Cloudflare Turnstile captcha-solving endpoint to the yescaptcha proxy worker, effectively closing the gap in supported task types. The new endpoint, `POST /captcha/token/turnstile`, mirrors existing token endpoints and includes necessary billing and async capabilities. Additionally, documentation and OpenAPI specifications have been updated to reflect these changes.

items.title: Enhance Relay Authority State Management in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update releases Extension 0.7.6, introducing a liveness-aware MV3 watchdog that maintains healthy sockets during server heartbeats. Key improvements include refreshing one-use bootstrap and ensuring socket replacements occur only after heartbeat timeouts. Additionally, periodic alarms are preserved across service-worker resumes, enhancing overall reliability.

items.title: Unify Resource Authority for Browser Connections in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces outdated browser Connection and Device tombstone semantics with a streamlined current-resource deletion approach. Key changes include the introduction of the AuthBackend `BrowserRelayOwnerLease` for enhanced authorization and routing, as well as the requirement for heartbeat refreshes to maintain device connections. The modifications aim to improve session security and eliminate legacy issues with revoked connections.

items.title: Streamline Active Connections in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the user experience by ensuring only active browser devices and connections are rendered. It preserves expired OAuth and MCP rows for reconnection while immediately removing disconnected connections. Additionally, it implements request fencing to prevent outdated responses from reintroducing deleted rows.

items.title: Enhance Owner Authority Synchronization in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the synchronization of owner authority by refreshing the AuthBackend owner lease with each successful Redis heartbeat. It ensures that the Auth lease is only released when Redis confirms the socket is still the current owner, enhancing reliability and logging for supersession and release decisions. The changes have been validated with a full Browser Relay suite and focused auth/websocket tests.

items.title: Unify Device State Management in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the AuthBackend by making the BrowserRelayOwnerLease the primary authority for online/picker states. It introduces new APIs for lease management, deletes inactive browser connections, and ensures only active devices are listed. Additionally, it improves the update mechanism for the last seen timestamp during device interactions.

items.title: Enhance Campaign Language Options in Frontend Web 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces new delivery language options in the Campaign composer, allowing users to select between Automatic, English only, and Chinese only. The selected mode is now displayed in the review and Campaign detail sections, enhancing user experience. Additionally, the API contract remains safe for rolling deployments with an optional field and fallback to 'auto'.

items.title: Enhance Email Campaign Language Selection in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new feature allowing the selection of campaign delivery languages, including automatic, English, and Simplified Chinese. The delivery language is now locked with the content hash, ensuring consistency across audience previews and templates. Additionally, the system will fail closed on any mismatches between recipient locales and templates, enhancing overall reliability.

items.title: Transition GPT 5.6 Luna to Free in AceChat 🚀
items.summary: This update moves the free billing override from GPT 5.4 Mini to GPT 5.6 Luna specifically for AceChat. It ensures that both manual and scheduled runs maintain consistent billing practices while preserving the shared pricing structure for other chat APIs. The changes have been validated with extensive testing, confirming that the new setup functions as intended.

items.title: Enhance Locator Resolution Budget Handling in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an optional `max_resolution_attempts` parameter, which is now accepted only when set to exactly 2. The budget is bound into command grant claims and the canonical request hash, improving the handling of locator resolution. Additionally, focused serializer regressions have been added to ensure stability.

items.title: Enhance Video Duration Validation in Platform Service 🎥
items.summary: This update introduces a minimum duration check for video requests to prevent upstream errors. The new `GROK_VIDEO_MIN_DURATION` ensures that requests with durations below the model-specific minimum are clamped to the minimum value instead of being rejected. This change improves user experience by reducing unnecessary 400 errors while maintaining consistent billing practices.

items.title: Complete Discord Bot Service Onboarding in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update finalizes the onboarding process for the Discord Bot Deployment service, making it fully operational for users. Key additions include a new script for data-layer onboarding and comprehensive HTML landing pages that detail service capabilities. The changes ensure a seamless user experience and provide essential information about the service's features and usage.

items.title: Enhance CI for Discord Bot Chart Release in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves a 403 Forbidden error during the chart release workflow by utilizing the `GHCR_TOKEN` for org-level package pushes. The change ensures that future CI runs can operate independently without manual intervention. Additionally, the chart has been manually published to maintain service continuity while this fix is implemented.

items.title: Rebranding AI Solutions to Data Processing and Analysis in Germey Tech 🚀
items.summary: This update removes all AI branding from the Germey Tech marketing site, renaming the second scoped service from AI Solutions to Data Processing and Analysis. Key changes include updates to multiple HTML files, the app.py, and site.js to ensure consistency across the platform. The internal plan key remains unchanged to avoid breaking existing checkout links.

items.title: Stabilize Ruff Linting in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update pins Ruff to the validated 0.9.10 baseline to ensure consistent linting across the repository. It also installs the same lint requirements in CI, preventing unexpected changes from floating releases. The isolated installation has been validated, confirming that 223 files are already formatted correctly.

items.title: Revamped x402 Resource Architecture in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update corrects the x402 direct resource architecture, replacing the previous Bearer/Credits design. Key changes include the removal of API Bearer tokens and a streamlined execution path that enhances resource management and settlement processes. The new architecture ensures that all interactions are validated and that the x402Backend serves as the sole official resource server.

items.title: Enable direct execution of signed x402 resources in X402 Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a generic direct x402 Resource Server that executes signed resources without requiring bearer tokens, credits, or service-specific executors. It validates cluster-local targets, maintains atomic USDC pricing, stores encrypted artifacts before settlement, and returns resource bodies only after durable receipts. The rollout is currently in draft, with no production DNS or ingress changes, ensuring a secure and streamlined execution flow.

items.title: Decoupled X402 Catalog from Credits in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a significant architectural correction by publishing a signed generic direct-resource catalog without dependencies on credits or various endpoints. Key changes include the removal of quote and usage endpoints, along with a streamlined resource requirement process. Validation tests have passed successfully, ensuring stability and readiness for future implementation.

items.title: Enhance YesCaptcha with BYOP Proxy and Timing Features in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces two major enhancements to the YesCaptcha service: the ability for users to bring their own proxy (BYOP) and the inclusion of elapsed time metrics for captcha solves. Users can now specify a proxy to improve IP quality and avoid errors, while every solve response will now include timestamps and elapsed time, aligning with platform standards. These changes enhance user control and provide better performance tracking.

items.title: Upgrade to GPT 5.6 Models in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the previous ChatGPT models (5.5 and 5.4) with the new GPT 5.6 models: Sol, Terra, and Luna. Notably, GPT 5.6 Luna is now the default and the only free model for new chats and scheduled tasks. All related locale files and tests have been updated to reflect these changes, ensuring a seamless transition.

items.title: Enhance Real Relay Wait Command in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a real `wait/condition` command to the Extension Relay fixture, allowing it to wait for delayed DOM states and return device-signed results. The changes include modifications to the fixture and the corresponding test specifications, ensuring that the command operates effectively. Validation has confirmed that the new command passes the tests successfully.

items.title: Docs alignment verified for hcaptcha, image2text, and recaptcha in Clis 🚀
items.summary: The documentation sync for `hcaptcha`, `image2text`, and `recaptcha` has been validated against the current CLI packages. The `hcaptcha` endpoints are aligned with the OpenAPI specifications, while no corresponding directories exist for `image2text` and `recaptcha`, resulting in no code changes. This PR serves as a record of the no-op sync verification.

items.title: Enhance Browser Core Isolation in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces executable checks to ensure that the browser core does not contain any references to Xiaohongshu or TikTok semantics. Additionally, it confirms that TikTok remains on its audited OAuth/API path until explicit approval for a browser canary is granted. The changes include the addition of a new test file that successfully passed validation.

items.title: Enhance command handling by rejecting expired requests in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a mechanism to reject browser commands that have expired before they reach the ledger or browser authority. It ensures that expired commands are filtered out after grant verification, enhancing the reliability of command execution. The changes include modifications to the command dispatcher and additional tests to validate the new behavior.

items.title: Enhance Browser Streaming Validation in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an incremental SHA-256 and size validator for browser transfer streams, ensuring data integrity during streaming. It includes tests for success, mismatches, and early-aborts, enhancing the robustness of the streaming process. The new functionality is the first P0-4 streaming primitive from a related pull request.

items.title: Enhance CI for Discord Bot Chart with yq in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the fragile `sed` command in the chart-release workflow with `yq`, ensuring reliable edits to `values.yaml`. This change prevents corruption that previously led to a 404 error for the `discord-bot` blueprint by sanitizing the image tag and chart version bump. The fix has been verified locally with successful `helm lint` and `helm package` executions.

items.title: Enhance Captcha Integration Guide in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update adds the source file for the asynchronous polling integration guide for the `/captcha/tasks` API, ensuring it is now available in the repository. The new document, `development_captcha_tasks.md`, provides detailed instructions on the API's usage, including task creation and error handling. This addition aligns with existing translations and ensures future documentation syncs function correctly.

items.title: Streamlined WeChat Automation Setup in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update renames the deployment setup to 'WeChat Automation Bot Service' across public locales and simplifies the configuration by removing unnecessary runtime specifications. The purchase gate remains, allowing deployment without client-selected presets, ensuring the backend manages the standard configuration effectively.

items.title: Strengthen X402 Resource Contracts in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the X402 resource contracts by introducing signed JSON request/response content types and setting byte limits for requests and responses. It also implements stricter validation for catalog paths and ensures that only specific HTTPS endpoints are allowed. These changes aim to improve security and maintain explicit resource allowlisting.

items.title: Enhance Email Preview with Markdown Support in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the ability to render campaign Markdown in the live email preview, allowing for headings, lists, and clickable links. It enforces HTTPS links only and disables raw HTML to ensure security. Additionally, the help key has been backfilled across all locales, enhancing user guidance on supported authoring syntax.

items.title: Streamline Email Campaign Templates in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the unnecessary versioning from unlaunched marketing campaign template names, simplifying them to a more consistent format. The existing transactional service-notice templates remain unchanged, ensuring no disruption to current operations. All relevant tests have passed, confirming the integrity of the changes.

items.title: Deploy Wizard for Discord Proxy is Here in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new deployment wizard for the Discord proxy, allowing users to easily connect their Discord accounts. The wizard features a two-step process for token entry and instance size selection, ensuring secure handling of user tokens. Additionally, it includes internationalization support across multiple languages and improves user experience by addressing previous UX defects.

items.title: Enhance Discord Bot Deployment with Token Fixes in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new blueprint for the Discord bot service and resolves token corruption issues during deployment. Key changes include the use of `--set-string` for Discord tokens to prevent parsing errors, and the addition of regression tests to ensure deployment integrity. All deployment tests have passed successfully, confirming the robustness of these enhancements.

items.title: Exciting New Helm Chart for Per-Tenant Discord Deployments in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a Helm chart for deploying a per-tenant Discord account proxy, enabling the PlatformBackend to manage individual proxy pods for each tenant. Key changes include the addition of deployment, service, ingress, and secret templates, as well as CI workflows for building and pushing the worker image. The implementation ensures secure handling of Discord tokens and improves deployment reliability.
